name: Fresh Corn and Orzo
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 c  Fresh White Or Yellow Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pot of lightly salted, boiling water, cook the orzo until al dente, approximately 34 minutes.
2. Drain and toss with the olive oil. Set aside.
3. In a saucepan, combine the red pepper flakes, rice wine vinegar, corn syrup, bay leaves, and lime juice. Simmer for 5 minutes and cool. Remove bay leaves.
4. Toss the orzo, dressing, and remaining ingredients together. Chill and serve garnished with basil sprigs and lime wedges.
5. Sprinkle toasted pine nuts over the top.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings
